_meta.source: public websites + G2 + audit conducted during artifact build
_meta.warning: This data is curated for demo purposes. Production use should validate against live competitor sites.

typewise.name: Typewise
differentiators: Sits inside your existing helpdesk (Zendesk/Salesforce/Freshdesk/MS Dynamics) — no rip-and-replace
AI Assistant for agents + autonomous AI Agents in one orchestration layer
Co-developed with ETH Zurich NLP researchers
Tone guardrails, multilingual heritage from keyboard product
typewise.buyer_persona_fit: EU/DACH enterprise (retail, logistics, telecom, utilities) that already runs a major helpdesk and wants AI layered on top, not a chat-first replacement

fin.name: Fin by Intercom
differentiators: Massive G2 footprint and SERP dominance
Aggressive SEO on competitor comparison pages
weaknesses_vs_typewise: Chatbot-first — assumes you replace your help desk with Intercom
Less native fit for teams running Zendesk/Salesforce as system of record
US-hosted by default, weaker story for EU data residency

decagon.name: Decagon
differentiators: Notion, Duolingo, Hertz, Eventbrite, Bilt as logos
weaknesses_vs_typewise: Single-agent architecture vs Typewise's multi-agent orchestration

sierra.name: Sierra (Bret Taylor)
founders: Bret Taylor (ex-Salesforce co-CEO, OpenAI board chair)
differentiators: Brand of choice for top-down enterprise sales
weaknesses_vs_typewise: Replacement-narrative scares CS leaders watching headcount cuts
Limited SEO/community presence — relies on top-down

zendesk_ai.name: Zendesk AI / Answer Bot
differentiators: Lowest switching cost for existing Zendesk customers
weaknesses_vs_typewise: Only useful if you're already on Zendesk
